reference: My upper right arm feels like it has been punched. There are no lumps in my arms that I can feel. Movement is also limited. I experience stabbing pain when I use my right arm to reach across to touch my left shoulder. I have nightly charley horses in that area. I also feel stabbing pains when lifting anything more than the remote. This has been going on for three months. I am right-handed, so is it possible I have re-injured myself?
text: My upper right arm feels like it has been punched. There are no lumps in my arms that I can feel. Movement is also limited. I experience stabbing pain when I use my right arm to reach across to touch my rough shoulder. I have nightly Charlie horses in that area. I also feel stabbing pains when lifting anything more than the remote. This has been going on for three months. I am right-handed, so is it possible I have re-injured myself?
